name: Wolf Link - Hero of the Wild
description:
“Even though you change shape, I still understand you.”

The Hylian Champion’s 100-year slumber in the Shrine of Resurrection left his body in an incredibly decrepit state, his wounds shifting and reacting from Ganon’s Malice to a form similar to a certain hero from the Age of Twilight long forgotten...

(based on “KePa - Wolf Link BotW port” on GameBanana)
creator: hedgywedgy
